task: Ralph R14 (2026-05-15): close R13's 3 P3 harness-expectation gaps so the matrix gives clean signal; re-run + surface any newly-visible bugs; fix new P0/P1. Rate limits stay OFF on dodev; NO security weakening. Sonnet for testing, Opus for root cause + fix. Commit, push, deploy. Never bind 0.0.0.0. Never touch prod.

stories.title: Update scripts/r10-api-matrix.ts to fix 3 P3 expectation gaps
acceptanceCriteria: Gap A: GET /admin/tools expectation aligns with reality — either path corrected to /admin/tools/modes OR 404 added to expected status set (the bare /admin/tools index has no handler by design)
Gap B: POST /auth/mfa/enroll/start expected statuses include 200 — handler ignores arbitrary bodies by design, returning 200 is correct
Gap C: DELETE /admin/email/config expected statuses include 200 — this is a real registered DELETE handler that deactivates the DB email config, not a wrong-verb probe target
Re-run produces 0 UNEXPECTED-STATUS for those 3 paths (or the same failures classified as PASS/EXPECTED)

stories.title: Run cleaned matrix vs dev — confirm clean signal
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/r10-api-matrix.ts re-run vs https://dev-api.doable.me → SERVER-5XX count = 0; UNEXPECTED-STATUS count <= 2 (only genuinely-new bugs)
All trailing-slash assertions PASS (regression check for PR #35)

stories.title: Triage any NEW UNEXPECTED-STATUS / SERVER-5XX failures
acceptanceCriteria: For each new failure, classify severity (P0/P1/P2/P3) with cite to repro path + observed body
P0/P1: file BUG-R14-* + Opus tracer + Opus executor fix on branch fix/r14-<slug>
P2/P3: log in R14 carry-over note; do not block this round
If zero new failures, mark passes:true with rationale 'matrix clean'

stories.title: Commit, push, merge harness updates + any fixes; deploy dev; final smoke
acceptanceCriteria: All R14 branches merged to main via PR with admin-merge
dodev pulled latest main + service restarted
ss -tlnp confirms NO 0.0.0.0 binds; all services on 127.0.0.1
Final smoke: /health 200, /templates/ 401 anon, logout-contract probe 4/4 PASS
